root.sql:
select * from ( SELECT sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.deposit_slip_no ,1 as seq_no ,sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.working_day ,sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.deposit_by_cash_balance as c_amount ,'' as c_dep ,sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.officer_id
,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name
,pka_dep.fp_get_print_code(sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.deposit_slip_no , sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.op_item_type ) as print_code ,sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.sign_flag
,sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ,pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXXXX' ) as from_deposit_account_no ,sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name ,sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no
,si_security_user.user_name ,sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.op_receive_int ,sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.op_tax ,sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.fee_amount ,sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.op_money_real FROM sc_dep_t_deposit_slip ,sc_dep_m_creditor ,sc_dep_m_rule ,sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type ,si_security_user --,sc_fin_vourcher_head WHERE ( sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and (sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.op_item_type = sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_type ) and ( sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.officer_id = si_security_user.user_id ) -- and ( sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.deposit_slip_no not in ( select deposit_slip_no -- from sc_dep_t_dwt_detail ) ) --and ( sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.fin_status = '1' ) --and ( sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.cancel_status = '0' ) --and ( sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.vourcher_no = sc_fin_vourcher_head.vourcher_no ) --and sc_dep_m_rule.insure_status = '0'
--and ( sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.print_code not in ('INT' , 'INC' , 'TAX' ) )
and ( sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.deposit_slip_type = 'CCA' ) and ( sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.cancel_status = '0' ) and ( sc_dep_t_deposit_slip.working_day between '!opdate_1!' and '!opdate_2!' ) /*WHERE*/
union
SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor_item.refer_to_deposit_doc_no as deposit_slip_no ,1 as seq_no ,sc_dep_m_creditor_item.working_day ,sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_balance as c_amount ,'' as c_dep ,sc_dep_m_creditor_item.officer_id
,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name
,pka_dep.fp_get_print_code(sc_dep_m_creditor_item.refer_to_deposit_doc_no , sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type ) as print_code ,sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.sign_flag
,sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ,pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXXXX' ) as from_deposit_account_no ,sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name ,sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no
,si_security_user.user_name ,sc_dep_m_creditor_item.old_acc_int as op_receive_int ,0 as op_tax ,0 as fee_amount ,0 as op_money_real FROM sc_dep_m_creditor_item ,sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type ,sc_dep_m_creditor ,sc_dep_m_rule ,si_security_user
WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.deposit_account_no = sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type = sc_dep_m_ucf_dep_item_type.deposit_item_type ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.officer_id = si_security_user.user_id ) -- and ( ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type = 'CCA' ) or ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type = 'WTL' and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance = 0 ) ) --in( 'WTL' ,'C/C' ) and ( ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type = 'CCA' ) or ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.item_type = 'WTL' and sc_dep_m_creditor_item.refer_to_deposit_doc_no in( select loan_contract_no from sc_lon_m_contract where begining_of_contract = sc_dep_m_creditor_item.working_day and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type in( '4' , '8' ) ) ) ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.working_day between '!opdate_1!' and '!opdate_2!' ) and ( sc_dep_m_creditor_item.refer_to_deposit_doc_no not in ( select deposit_slip_no from sc_dep_t_deposit_slip ) ) /*WHERE*/
)tab where 1 = 1 -- and tab.deposit_account_no = '50005830' order by tab.deposit_type_code ,tab.officer_id ,tab.working_day ,tab.sign_flag ,tab.deposit_account_no ,tab.deposit_slip_no ,tab.seq_no
